metadata.name: Handle an Order with Special Instructions

description: A customer adds a note to their order: 'Please gift wrap'. This instruction must be visible to the warehouse packer.

nodes.task_description: The customer's note is captured with the order.

expected_outcome.expected: The special instruction is saved on the order record.

nodes.task_description: When the order is released to the warehouse, the special instruction is flagged and displayed prominently on the packer's screen.

expected_outcome.expected: The packer is clearly alerted to the gift wrap request.

nodes.task_description: The packer performs the gift wrapping and confirms the special task is complete before generating the shipping label.

expected_outcome.expected: The value-added service is performed correctly.
